ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user wearing the device */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific device */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time the data was recorded */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Detected activity by the device */,
  "acceleration_x" REAL /* X-axis acceleration reading */,
  "acceleration_y" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration reading */,
  "acceleration_z" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration reading */,
  "gyro_x" REAL /* X-axis gyroscope reading */,
  "gyro_y" REAL /* Y-axis gyroscope reading */,
  "gyro_z" REAL /* Z-axis gyroscope reading */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the device */,
  "gps_location" TEXT /* GPS location of the device */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the user */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Body temperature of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_activity FOREIGN KEY ("activity") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., end-user, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Current hardware version of the device */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Manufacture date of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the activity (e.g., exercise, sleep, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_recognition" (
  "recognition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recognized activity */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor data used for recognition */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recognized activity */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recognition */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recognition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_recognition_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_recognition_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "time_recorded" TEXT /* Time the metric was recorded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., physical, mental, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., fall detected) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time the alert was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., high, low) */,
  "acknowledged" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been acknowledged by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who shared the data */,
  "third_party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the third party receiving the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific data shared */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date the data was shared */,
  "sharing_type" TEXT /* Type of sharing (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sharing_third_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("third_party_id") REFERENCES third_parties ("third_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sharing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_parties" (
  "third_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each third party */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the third party */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the third party */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the third party */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the third party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("third_party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., error, warning, info) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time the log entry was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
